meta.project: AgriSense v2.0 — Flask Backend + Weather API

product_overview: AgriSense is a Flask-based agricultural decision support backend that predicts the best crop, estimated yield, and market price from soil and weather inputs. It also integrates live weather and mandi market data to help farmers make more informed planning decisions.
core_goals: Provide accurate crop recommendations using ML models and farm input data
Estimate expected yield and market price for the predicted crop
Support optional live weather auto-fill to reduce manual data entry
Expose live weather and mandi price data through simple public APIs
Offer operational visibility through health checks, crop listings, and prediction history
Collect feedback on prediction accuracy to improve recommendations over time

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Allows clients to verify the backend is running and confirm loaded models and weather API configuration.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with status, loaded model names, crop count, weather API state, and server time
GET /api/health when the server is misconfigured -> Receive 200 with status and weather_api showing a non-configured or unavailable state

features.name: Crop Listing
features.description: Returns the full set of supported crops with metadata such as icons, seasons, and farming insights.
user_flows: GET /api/crops -> Receive 200 with crops array and total count of supported crops
GET /api/crops when the service is unavailable -> Receive an error response from the server and no crop metadata

features.name: Crop Prediction
features.description: Accepts soil and weather inputs to generate a crop recommendation, yield estimate, and price estimate, with optional live weather merge.
user_flows: POST /api/predict with valid JSON body containing N, P, K, ph, humidity, temperature, rainfall -> Receive 200 with prediction_id, crop recommendation, yield estimate, price estimate, confidence, top3 predictions, inputs, and timestamp

POST /api/predict with use_weather=true and city provided -> GET /api/weather/autofill?city=<city> -> Receive 200 weather autofill values -> POST /api/predict with merged inputs -> Receive 200 with prediction results including weather data
POST /api/predict with invalid Content-Type or malformed payload -> Receive 400 with error stating Content-Type must be application/json
POST /api/predict with missing or out-of-range fields -> Receive 422 with validation failed error and details list

features.name: Weather Data
features.description: Fetches live weather and farming advisories for a requested city, including a version shaped for form auto-fill.
user_flows: GET /api/weather?city=Chennai -> Receive 200 with full weather object including temperature, humidity, rainfall, advisory, and sunrise/sunset data
GET /api/weather/autofill?city=Mumbai -> Receive 200 with city, country, autofill values, and display metadata for frontend prefill
GET /api/weather without city query parameter -> Receive 400 with an error message indicating city is required
GET /api/weather/autofill?city=UnknownCity -> Receive 503 when the external weather provider is unavailable

features.name: Prediction History
features.description: Returns recent prediction results stored in memory for review and debugging.
user_flows: GET /api/history?limit=50 -> Receive 200 with history array and total count of stored predictions
POST /api/predict with valid inputs -> Receive 200 with prediction_id -> GET /api/history?limit=1 -> Receive 200 with the most recent prediction entry
GET /api/history?limit=500 -> Receive 200 with history response constrained by server-side maximum limit
GET /api/history after server restart -> Receive 200 with an empty or reduced in-memory history because history is not persisted

features.name: User Feedback
features.description: Accepts feedback about whether a prediction was correct and what the actual crop was.
user_flows: POST /api/feedback with prediction_id and optional correct/actual_crop values -> Receive 200 with status received and the same prediction_id
POST /api/feedback with valid JSON but missing prediction_id -> Receive 422 with error stating prediction_id is required
POST /api/feedback with invalid Content-Type or malformed JSON -> Receive 400 with error stating Content-Type must be application/json

features.name: Mandi Market Prices
features.description: Returns live mandi commodity price data from the Indian government open data source.
user_flows: GET /api/mandi -> Receive 200 with government market price records
GET /api/mandi when the upstream data source fails -> Receive 500 with an error message describing the failure

features.name: Static Frontend Serving
features.description: Serves the single-page frontend HTML or API info from the root route.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with the frontend HTML page or API info JSON
GET / with the static index file missing -> Receive an error response instead of the frontend page

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Returns API health status including loaded models and weather API configuration

endpoints.description: Health check with model and weather key status

response_schema.200: { status: string, models: string[], crops: number, weather_api: string, time: string }

features.name: Crop Listing
features.description: Lists all supported crops with metadata including icons, seasons, and farming insights

endpoints.description: List all supported crops with metadata

features.name: Crop Prediction
features.description: ML-powered crop recommendation, yield estimation, and price prediction based on soil and weather parameters. Supports optional live weather auto-fill.

endpoints.description: Predict best crop, expected yield, and market price from soil/weather inputs

response_schema.200: { prediction_id: string, crop: { name, icon, insight, seasons }, yield: { value, unit, range }, price: { value, unit }, confidence: number, top3: CropPrediction[], inputs: object, weather: object|null, timestamp: string }

features.name: Weather Data
features.description: Fetches live weather data from OpenWeatherMap API for a given city, with farming advisories

endpoints.description: Get full weather data for a city
Get weather data shaped as form input values for auto-filling prediction form

response_schema.200: { city: string, country: string, autofill: { temperature, humidity, rainfall }, display: object, fetched_at: string }

features.name: Prediction History
features.description: Returns the most recent prediction results stored in memory

endpoints.description: Get prediction history with optional limit

features.name: User Feedback
features.description: Accepts user feedback on prediction accuracy

features.name: Mandi Market Prices
features.description: Fetches live market prices from Indian government open data API

response_schema.200: Government API JSON response with market price records

features.name: Static Frontend Serving
features.description: Serves the single-page HTML frontend from the static directory

endpoints.description: Serve the frontend HTML page or API info JSON

response_schema.200: HTML page or JSON API info

known_limitations.issue: Prediction history is stored in-memory and lost on server restart
known_limitations.impact: No persistent storage of predictions across restarts

known_limitations.issue: No authentication or rate limiting on any endpoint
known_limitations.impact: All endpoints are publicly accessible without restrictions

known_limitations.issue: ML models trained with scikit-learn 1.7.2 loaded on 1.8.0 causing version warnings
known_limitations.impact: Potential for breaking changes or invalid results due to version mismatch

known_limitations.issue: Mandi API key is hardcoded in source code
known_limitations.impact: Security risk - API key exposed in source
